description_long: This bungalow features a modern, low-profile design with a dark sloped roof and multiple skylights. The front yard is enclosed by a fence and includes a paved walkway, manicured lawn, and a central tree surrounded by shrubbery. The structure has a combination of brick and wood-textured exterior walls, with a prominent covered porch area at the rear. Large windows and glass doors are visible, providing ample natural light to the interior. The property is bordered by a solid wall and privacy hedges, enhancing its secluded feel. The overall layout is compact, with a single story and a clear separation between the living space and outdoor garden.
description: A modern single-story bungalow with a dark sloped roof, skylights, and a landscaped front yard enclosed by a fence. The exterior combines brick and wood textures, featuring large windows and a covered rear porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved walkway, manicured lawn, central tree, and surrounding fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the building, privacy hedges, and the sloped roof with skylights.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the covered porch area, large windows, and the solid boundary wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garden area, tree, and the side entrance with visible glass doors.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
